name: Configure Facility Emergency Contacts
description:
Open the existing facility record 'Lone Star Chemical Processing' in EPA Tier2 Submit. Navigate to the Contacts section and enter the following personnel details exactly as specified:

Emergency Contact #1 (Primary):
- Name: Maria R. Vasquez
- Title: EHS Manager
- Phone: 512-555-0147
- 24-Hour Phone: 512-555-0189

Emergency Contact #2 (Secondary):
- Name: James T. Okoro
- Title: Plant Operations Supervisor
- Phone: 512-555-0231
- 24-Hour Phone: 512-555-0142

Information Contact (Person Preparing the Report):
- Name: David K. Thornton
- Title: Environmental Compliance Specialist
- Phone: 512-555-0163

After entering all the contact information, save the facility record to 'C:\Tier2Submit\LoneStar_Contacts.t2s' (using File > Save or Ctrl+S).
